name: Tropfkrapfen (Drop Donuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the egg yolks and whole eggs; blend until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, sift all dry ingredients (baking powder, baking soda, flour) except for the confectioners' sugar.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the creamed butter mixture, alternating with buttermilk or sour milk, stirring after each addition until fully incorporated.
5. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough into the hot oil, frying several at a time to maintain a consistent fat temperature.
7. Fry the donuts until golden brown on all sides.
8. Remove from the oil and drain on paper towels.
9. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar before serving.
